texto: Forgive your past because it the vehicle through your process and from this point forward your life is made of 100% future
autor: Caterpillars always look up despite having no wings... and butterflies don't waste time crying over the legs they lost or dwelling on on the ground.
explicacao: Citação de Caterpillars always look up despite having no wings... and butterflies don't waste time crying over the legs they lost or dwelling on on the ground. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Forgive your past because it the vehicle through your process and from this point forward your li…” articula reflexao, johnnie-dent-jr, forgive em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
